Subject: Urgent Request for Project Extension

Dear Professor Smith,

I am writing to respectfully request a brief extension for the upcoming group project, which is currently due in two days. I sincerely apologize for reaching out with this difficult news so close to the deadline, as I understand the importance of adhering to all academic timelines. Unfortunately, unforeseen circumstances have arisen that are preventing our team from completing the work to the high standard you expect.

First, one of our key team members has been hospitalized unexpectedly, leaving us short-handed during critical research phases. Second, we discovered a significant error in our initial data collection method yesterday, requiring us to restart several experiments to ensure accuracy before submission. This specific background detail highlights why we cannot rush the process without compromising the quality of our final presentation. We are fully committed to delivering excellent work, but we simply need a little more time to address these issues properly.

I sincerely apologize again for any inconvenience this request may cause you and the rest of the class. Extending the deadline by forty-eight hours would allow us to resolve these challenges and submit a polished, thorough project that truly reflects our efforts. Thank you very much for your time, understanding, and continued support of our academic growth.

Sincerely,

Jordan Lee
Student ID: 12345678
